data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for binding support for custom target entity/field scopes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of binding support for custom target entity/field scopes. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for such binding support, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that it is implemented or functioning as required, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of binding support for custom target entity/field scopes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
